interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the latitude and longitude of airports in the database?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the latitude and longitude of all airports.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT LATITUDE, LONGITUDE FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide the names of the airports along with the cities they are located in?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names of airports and the cities they are located in.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_AIRPORT.NAME, MONDIAL_CITY.NAME FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_CITY ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.CITY = MONDIAL_CITY.NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which airports have an elevation greater than 300 meters?
interactions.intention: Find the airports with an elevation greater than 300 meters.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT WHERE ELEVATION > 300

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which cities have airports and what are their respective countries?
interactions.intention: Find cities with airports and their respective countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITY.NAME, MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_CITY ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.CITY = MONDIAL_CITY.NAME AND MONDIAL_AIRPORT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the names of the airports and their GMT offsets?
interactions.intention: List the names of the airports and their GMT offsets.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, GMTOFFSET FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the elevation of each airport?
interactions.intention: Find the elevation of each airport.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which cities from the 'mondial_cityothername' table are located in the same provinces as cities in the 'mondial_located' table?
interactions.intention: Find cities that are in the same provinces as cities listed in another table.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATED ON MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_LOCATED.PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the other names of these cities?
interactions.intention: Get other names of the cities found in the previous question.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the cities along with their provinces in alphabetical order?
interactions.intention: Sort the cities and their provinces alphabetically.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT CITY, PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME ORDER BY CITY, PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total area of all continents?
interactions.intention: Find the total area by summing up the areas of all continents.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(AREA) FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the population of countries in Europe?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the population of countries located in Europe.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MC.COUNTRY, MC.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS MC JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ME ON MC.COUNTRY = ME.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_CONTINENT MCON ON MCON.NAME = ME.CONTINENT WHERE MCON.NAME = 'Europe'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the largest continent by area?
interactions.intention: Find the largest continent based on its area.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT ORDER BY AREA DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which deserts are located in countries with a GDP greater than 20,000?
interactions.intention: Find deserts located in countries that have a GDP greater than 20,000.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_DESERT.NAME FROM MONDIAL_DESERT JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT ON MONDIAL_DESERT.NAME = MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.DESERT JOIN MONDIAL_ECONOMY ON MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_ECONOMY.GDP > 20000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the area of these deserts?
interactions.intention: Find the area of the deserts identified in the previous query.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_DESERT.AREA FROM MONDIAL_DESERT WHERE MONDIAL_DESERT.NAME IN (SELECT MONDIAL_DESERT.NAME FROM MONDIAL_DESERT JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT ON MONDIAL_DESERT.NAME = MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.DESERT JOIN MONDIAL_ECONOMY ON MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_ECONOMY.GDP > 20000)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you rank these deserts by their area in descending order?
interactions.intention: Rank the deserts identified earlier by their area in descending order.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_DESERT.NAME, MONDIAL_DESERT.AREA FROM MONDIAL_DESERT WHERE MONDIAL_DESERT.NAME IN (SELECT MONDIAL_DESERT.NAME FROM MONDIAL_DESERT JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT ON MONDIAL_DESERT.NAME = MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.DESERT JOIN MONDIAL_ECONOMY ON MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_ECONOMY.GDP > 20000) ORDER BY MONDIAL_DESERT.AREA DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list all provinces mentioned in the estuary table?
interactions.intention: List all provinces in the estuary table.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers from the estuary table are also present in the river table along with their countries?
interactions.intention: Find rivers and their countries that are present in both the estuary and river tables.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT E.RIVER, E.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY E JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER R ON E.RIVER = R.RIVER

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide the provinces and countries for rivers that have the same name in the estuary and river tables?
interactions.intention: Get provinces and countries for rivers with the same name in both estuary and river tables.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT E.PROVINCE, E.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY E JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER R ON E.RIVER = R.RIVER

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the names of lakes along with the countries and provinces they belong to?
interactions.intention: Retrieve names of lakes along with their corresponding countries and provinces.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT LAKE, COUNTRY, PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which lakes are associated with rivers, and what are the rivers' names?
interactions.intention: Find lakes and their associated rivers.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE, MONDIAL_LAKE.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE JOIN MONDIAL_LAKE ON MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE = MONDIAL_LAKE.NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also tell me about lakes that are connected to rivers and the provinces they are in?
interactions.intention: Retrieve lakes, their associated rivers, and the provinces they belong to.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE, MONDIAL_LAKE.RIVER, MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE JOIN MONDIAL_LAKE ON MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE = MONDIAL_LAKE.NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the islands in Scotland?
interactions.intention: Find the names of islands located in Scotland.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND WHERE PROVINCE = 'Scotland'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which of these islands have information about their area or elevation?
interactions.intention: Get details about the area or elevation for the islands in Scotland.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MGI.ISLAND, MI.AREA, MI.ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND MGI JOIN MONDIAL_ISLAND MI ON MGI.ISLAND = MI.NAME WHERE MGI.PROVINCE = 'Scotland'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you sort these islands by their elevation?
interactions.intention: Sort the islands in Scotland by their elevation.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MGI.ISLAND, MI.ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND MGI JOIN MONDIAL_ISLAND MI ON MGI.ISLAND = MI.NAME WHERE MGI.PROVINCE = 'Scotland' ORDER BY MI.ELEVATION

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What types of organizations are associated with countries in this dataset?
interactions.intention: Find the types of organizations associated with countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT TYPE FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show the names of organizations and their associated countries?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names of organizations along with their associated countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.NAME, MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER JOIN MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION ON MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.ORGANIZATION = MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.ABBREVIATION

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which types of organizations are most common in the dataset?
interactions.intention: Find the most common types of organizations in the dataset.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT TYPE, COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER GROUP BY TYPE ORDER BY COUNT DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the population of provinces in countries that have different names for their provinces?
interactions.intention: Find the population of provinces in countries where provinces have alternative names.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_PROVPOPS.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME JOIN MONDIAL_PROVPOPS ON MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_PROVPOPS.PROVINCE AND MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_PROVPOPS.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the alternative names of these provinces?
interactions.intention: List the alternative names of these provinces.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME.OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: For provinces with alternative names, what is the dominant religion in their countries?
interactions.intention: Find the dominant religion in the countries of provinces with alternative names.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_RELIGION.NAME FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME JOIN MONDIAL_RELIGION ON MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_RELIGION.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the names of the seas listed in the table and order them alphabetically?
interactions.intention: List the names of the seas and order them alphabetically.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SEA1, SEA2 FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH ORDER BY SEA1, SEA2;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the unique seas mentioned in the first column of the table?
interactions.intention: Find the unique names of seas from the first column of the table.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT SEA1 FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which seas have the same name in both columns, and what are their areas?
interactions.intention: Find seas whose names appear in both columns and retrieve their areas.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT M.SEA1, S.AREA FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH M JOIN MONDIAL_SEA S ON M.SEA1 = S.NAME WHERE M.SEA1 = M.SEA2;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers flow into lakes located in the same province and country as Chimki?
interactions.intention: Find rivers that flow into lakes located in the same province and country as Chimki.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT RIVER FROM MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH INNER JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE ON MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH.LAKE = MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE INNER JOIN MONDIAL_CITY ON MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_CITY.PROVINCE AND MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_CITY.NAME = 'Chimki'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of cities in the same province as Chimki, ordered by population?
interactions.intention: Find the population of cities in the same province as Chimki, ordered by population.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_CITY WHERE PROVINCE = (SELECT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_CITY WHERE NAME = 'Chimki') ORDER BY POPULATION DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Are there any rivers connected to lakes in the same country and province as Odincovo?
interactions.intention: Check if there are rivers connected to lakes in the same country and province as Odincovo.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT RIVER FROM MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH INNER JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE ON MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH.LAKE = MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE INNER JOIN MONDIAL_CITY ON MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_CITY.PROVINCE AND MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_CITY.NAME = 'Odincovo'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the different names used for cities in the database?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the alternative names for cities.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which seas are located in the same provinces as the cities with alternative names?
interactions.intention: Find seas located in the provinces of cities with alternative names.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MGS.SEA FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME MC JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATED ML ON MC.CITY = ML.CITY AND MC.COUNTRY = ML.COUNTRY AND MC.PROVINCE = ML.PROVINCE JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SEA MGS ON ML.SEA = MGS.SEA AND ML.COUNTRY = MGS.COUNTRY AND ML.PROVINCE = MGS.PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Are there any rivers in the same provinces as these seas?
interactions.intention: Check if there are rivers in provinces with these seas.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ML.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME MC JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATED ML ON MC.CITY = ML.CITY AND MC.COUNTRY = ML.COUNTRY AND MC.PROVINCE = ML.PROVINCE WHERE ML.RIVER IS NOT NULL

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names and areas of all islands sorted by their area?
interactions.intention: List the names and areas of all islands ordered by their area.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, AREA FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND ORDER BY AREA DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the highest elevation among these islands?
interactions.intention: Find the highest elevation among the listed islands.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MAX(ELEVATION) AS MAX_ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which mountains are located on islands whose names are listed in the database?
interactions.intention: Find mountains located on islands listed in the database.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MOUNTAINONISLAND.MOUNTAIN, MOUNTAINONISLAND.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND MOUNTAINONISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_ISLAND ISLAND ON MOUNTAINONISLAND.ISLAND = ISLAND.NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries share borders with Albania and what are their capitals?
interactions.intention: Find the countries that share borders with Albania and their capitals.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MC2.NAME, MC2.CAPITAL FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS MB JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY MC1 ON MB.COUNTRY1 = MC1.CODE JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY MC2 ON MB.COUNTRY2 = MC2.CODE WHERE MC1.NAME = 'Albania'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total area of the countries that border Albania?
interactions.intention: Calculate the total area of the countries neighboring Albania.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(MC2.AREA) FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS MB JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY MC1 ON MB.COUNTRY1 = MC1.CODE JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY MC2 ON MB.COUNTRY2 = MC2.CODE WHERE MC1.NAME = 'Albania'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you rank Albania's borders by their length in descending order?
interactions.intention: List Albania's borders with neighboring countries ranked by their length in descending order.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY1, COUNTRY2, LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE COUNTRY1 = 'AL' OR COUNTRY2 = 'AL' ORDER BY LENGTH DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me which seas are linked to the Sea of Japan?
interactions.intention: Find seas connected to the Sea of Japan.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT M2.SEA2 FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SEA G JOIN MONDIAL_SEA S ON G.SEA = S.NAME JOIN MONDIAL_MERGESWITH M2 ON S.NAME = M2.SEA1 WHERE G.SEA = 'Sea of Japan';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the depth of each sea linked to the Sea of Japan?
interactions.intention: Find the depth of seas connected to the Sea of Japan.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT S2.NAME, S2.DEPTH FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SEA G JOIN MONDIAL_SEA S1 ON G.SEA = S1.NAME JOIN MONDIAL_MERGESWITH M2 ON S1.NAME = M2.SEA1 JOIN MONDIAL_SEA S2 ON M2.SEA2 = S2.NAME WHERE G.SEA = 'Sea of Japan';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the provinces where the Sea of Japan is located, sorted alphabetically?
interactions.intention: List provinces where the Sea of Japan is located, sorted alphabetically.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SEA WHERE SEA = 'Sea of Japan' ORDER BY PROVINCE;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide the total border length each country shares with its neighbors?
interactions.intention: Find the total border length of each country with its neighbors.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY1, SUM(LENGTH) AS TOTAL_BORDER_LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS GROUP BY COUNTRY1

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the pairs of neighboring countries with borders longer than 200 kilometers?
interactions.intention: List neighboring country pairs with border lengths exceeding 200 kilometers.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY1, COUNTRY2, LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE LENGTH >= 200

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: For the countries with borders over 200 kilometers, what type of government do they have?
interactions.intention: Find the government types of countries with borders over 200 kilometers.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MB.COUNTRY1, MP.GOVERNMENT FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS MB JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP ON MB.COUNTRY1 = MP.COUNTRY WHERE LENGTH >= 200

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me which organizations are associated with each country?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the organizations linked to each country.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_COUNTRY.NAME, MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.NAME FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION ON MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_COUNTRY.CODE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries have their provinces' populations in the database?
interactions.intention: Find countries with population data available for their provinces.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_COUNTRY.NAME FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_PROVPOPS ON MONDIAL_PROVPOPS.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_COUNTRY.CODE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total population of each country?
interactions.intention: Calculate the total population for each country.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which cities have alternative names and are located along rivers?
interactions.intention: Find cities with alternative names that are situated along rivers.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY, MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATED ON MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY = MONDIAL_LOCATED.CITY WHERE MONDIAL_LOCATED.RIVER IS NOT NULL

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What about cities with alternative names that are located on islands?
interactions.intention: Find cities with alternative names that are located on islands.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY, MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATEDON ON MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY = MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.CITY WHERE MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.ISLAND IS NOT NULL

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list cities with alternative names that are in the same country as rivers?
interactions.intention: Find cities with alternative names that are in the same country as rivers.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY, MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER ON MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the population trends of cities in provinces belonging to specific countries?
interactions.intention: Get the population trends of cities in provinces for specific countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT C.CITY, C.YEAR, C.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS C JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCE P ON C.PROVINCE = P.NAME WHERE C.COUNTRY = P.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which continents do these countries belong to?
interactions.intention: Find out which continents the countries of the mentioned provinces belong to.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT E.CONTINENT FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS C JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCE P ON C.PROVINCE = P.NAME JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES E ON C.COUNTRY = E.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total population of these provinces over the years?
interactions.intention: Calculate the total population of the provinces over the years.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME, SUM(C.POPULATION) AS TOTAL_POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS C JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCE P ON C.PROVINCE = P.NAME GROUP BY P.NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names and areas of the deserts?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names and areas of all deserts.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, AREA FROM MONDIAL_DESERT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries have deserts, and what are their names?
interactions.intention: Find the names of countries that have deserts and the names of those deserts.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MGD.COUNTRY, MD.NAME FROM MONDIAL_DESERT MD JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT MGD ON MD.NAME = MGD.DESERT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the GDP of countries that have deserts?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the GDP of countries that have deserts.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ME.COUNTRY, ME.GDP FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY ME JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT MGD ON ME.COUNTRY = MGD.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries have a significant percentage of specific ethnic groups along with their population growth rates?
interactions.intention: Identify countries with significant ethnic group percentages and their population growth rates.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ME.COUNTRY, ME.NAME, ME.PERCENTAGE, MP.POPULATION_GROWTH FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP ME JOIN MONDIAL_POPULATION MP ON ME.COUNTRY = MP.COUNTRY WHERE ME.PERCENTAGE > 20

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the ethnic groups in those countries sorted by their percentage?
interactions.intention: List the ethnic groups in the specified countries, sorted by percentage.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP WHERE PERCENTAGE > 20 ORDER BY PERCENTAGE DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What type of government do these countries have?
interactions.intention: Find the government types of the specified countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ME.COUNTRY, MP.GOVERNMENT FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP ME JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP ON ME.COUNTRY = MP.COUNTRY WHERE ME.PERCENTAGE > 20

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me which rivers flow through estuaries and their corresponding countries?
interactions.intention: Find rivers and their corresponding countries that flow through estuaries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT RIVER, COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which provinces are associated with these estuaries?
interactions.intention: Find the provinces associated with the previously mentioned estuaries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide details about the sources of these rivers, including their countries and provinces?
interactions.intention: Find details about the sources of rivers flowing through estuaries, including their countries and provinces.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.RIVER, MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY ON MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.RIVER = MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.RIVER

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me which provinces are associated with the Sea of Japan?
interactions.intention: Find the provinces associated with the Sea of Japan.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SEA WHERE SEA = 'Sea of Japan'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which provinces listed have the shortest names?
interactions.intention: Find the provinces with the shortest names from the previously listed ones.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SEA WHERE SEA = 'Sea of Japan' ORDER BY LENGTH(PROVINCE) ASC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What islands are located in the same seas as these provinces?
interactions.intention: Find the islands located in the seas associated with the previously listed provinces.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_ISLANDIN ON MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.ISLAND = MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SEA ON MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.SEA = MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA = 'Sea of Japan'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which organizations have a connection to any country that speaks Greek?
interactions.intention: Find organizations linked to countries where Greek is spoken.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MO.NAME FROM MONDIAL_LANGUAGE ML JOIN MONDIAL_ISMEMBER MI ON ML.COUNTRY = MI.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION MO ON MI.ORGANIZATION = MO.ABBREVIATION WHERE ML.NAME = 'Greek'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the types of memberships these organizations have?
interactions.intention: Get the types of memberships for the previously identified organizations.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT TYPE FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER WHERE ORGANIZATION IN (SELECT DISTINCT MI.ORGANIZATION FROM MONDIAL_LANGUAGE ML JOIN MONDIAL_ISMEMBER MI ON ML.COUNTRY = MI.COUNTRY WHERE ML.NAME = 'Greek')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you sort these membership types alphabetically?
interactions.intention: Sort the membership types alphabetically.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT TYPE FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER WHERE ORGANIZATION IN (SELECT DISTINCT MI.ORGANIZATION FROM MONDIAL_LANGUAGE ML JOIN MONDIAL_ISMEMBER MI ON ML.COUNTRY = MI.COUNTRY WHERE ML.NAME = 'Greek') ORDER BY TYPE ASC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which mountains are located in both the mondial_geo_mountain and mondial_mountain tables?
interactions.intention: Find mountains that are listed in both mountain-related tables.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MOUNTAIN FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN INNER JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN ON MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.MOUNTAIN = MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN.NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me if any of these mountains are also linked to islands in the mondial_mountainonisland table?
interactions.intention: Check if mountains listed in both previous tables are also associated with islands.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.MOUNTAIN FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN INNER JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN ON MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.MOUNTAIN = MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN.NAME INNER JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND ON MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.MOUNTAIN = MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.MOUNTAIN

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names of islands linked to these mountains?
interactions.intention: Find the names of islands associated with the mountains identified earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN INNER JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN ON MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.MOUNTAIN = MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN.NAME INNER JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND ON MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.MOUNTAIN = MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.MOUNTAIN

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the names and populations of countries that share a border with Albania?
interactions.intention: Get the names and populations of countries that share a border with Albania.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MC.NAME, MC.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS MB JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY MC ON MB.COUNTRY2 = MC.CODE WHERE MB.COUNTRY1 = 'AL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total border length of Albania with its neighbors?
interactions.intention: Calculate the total border length of Albania with its neighboring countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(LENGTH) AS TOTAL_BORDER_LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE COUNTRY1 = 'AL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which cities in Albania have a population greater than 100,000 and are near its neighboring countries?
interactions.intention: Find cities in Albania with a population over 100,000 that are near its neighboring countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MCP.CITY, MCP.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS MCP JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY MC ON MCP.COUNTRY = MC.CODE JOIN MONDIAL_BORDERS MB ON MC.CODE = MB.COUNTRY1 WHERE MB.COUNTRY1 = 'AL' AND MCP.POPULATION > 100000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me which rivers flow into a lake and their corresponding lake names?
interactions.intention: Find rivers that flow into a lake and their corresponding lake names.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_RIVER.NAME, MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH.LAKE FROM MONDIAL_RIVER JOIN MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH ON MONDIAL_RIVER.NAME = MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH.RIVER WHERE MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH.LAKE IS NOT NULL;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which of these rivers has the longest length?
interactions.intention: Identify the river with the maximum length from the previous result.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_RIVER WHERE NAME IN (SELECT RIVER FROM MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH WHERE LAKE IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY LENGTH DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the source elevation of that river?
interactions.intention: Find the source elevation of the river identified in the previous question.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SOURCEELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_RIVER WHERE NAME = (SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_RIVER WHERE NAME IN (SELECT RIVER FROM MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH WHERE LAKE IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY LENGTH DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY);

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names and IATA codes of the airports in the Czech Republic?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names and IATA codes of airports located in the Czech Republic.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, IATACODE FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT WHERE COUNTRY = 'CZ';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also provide the elevation of these airports?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the elevation of the airports in the Czech Republic along with their names and IATA codes.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, IATACODE, ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT WHERE COUNTRY = 'CZ';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which islands are associated with these airports, if any?
interactions.intention: Find the islands associated with the airports in the Czech Republic, if applicable.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MA.NAME, MA.IATACODE, MG.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT MA LEFT JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND MG ON MA.ISLAND = MG.ISLAND WHERE MA.COUNTRY = 'CZ';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What was the population in different years for each country?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the population data for each year for all countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, YEAR, POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the population trend for a specific country, say 'C'?
interactions.intention: Get the population trend over the years for country 'C'.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT YEAR, POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS WHERE COUNTRY = 'C' ORDER BY YEAR

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What languages are spoken in countries with population data available?
interactions.intention: Find the languages spoken in countries that have population data.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ML.COUNTRY, ML.NAME FROM MONDIAL_LANGUAGE ML JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS MCP ON ML.COUNTRY = MCP.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which organizations are associated with countries listed in the mondial_ismember table?
interactions.intention: Find organizations linked to countries in the database.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.NAME, MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER JOIN MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION ON MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.ORGANIZATION = MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.ABBREVIATION

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What types of memberships are recorded in this table?
interactions.intention: List the types of memberships mentioned in the data.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT TYPE FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide the countries, their organizations, and the main religions associated?
interactions.intention: Get countries, their organizations, and predominant religions.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.NAME, MONDIAL_RELIGION.NAME FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER JOIN MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION ON MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.ORGANIZATION = MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.ABBREVIATION JOIN MONDIAL_RELIGION ON MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_RELIGION.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names and populations of all cities ordered by their population in descending order?
interactions.intention: List all cities with their populations sorted by population in descending order.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_CITY ORDER BY POPULATION DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which mountains are located in the same provinces as the cities listed earlier?
interactions.intention: Find mountains located in the provinces of the previously listed cities.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MOUNTAIN FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN WHERE PROVINCE IN (SELECT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_CITY)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also find the islands associated with these cities?
interactions.intention: Retrieve islands associated with the cities listed earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_LOCATEDON WHERE CITY IN (SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_CITY)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What was the population of countries in the year 2012?
interactions.intention: Find the population of countries for the year 2012.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS WHERE YEAR = 2012

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me which continents these countries belong to?
interactions.intention: Find the continents corresponding to the countries listed earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MC.COUNTRY, ME.CONTINENT FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS MC JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ME ON MC.COUNTRY = ME.COUNTRY WHERE MC.YEAR = 2012

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which country on that continent had the highest population in 2012?
interactions.intention: Find the country with the highest population in 2012 on a specific continent.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, MAX(POPULATION) FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS WHERE YEAR = 2012 GROUP BY COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names and percentages of all ethnic groups in the dataset?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names and percentages of all ethnic groups.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the population growth for countries that have data on ethnic groups?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the population growth for countries with available ethnic group data.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_POPULATION.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_POPULATION.POPULATION_GROWTH FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP JOIN MONDIAL_POPULATION ON MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_POPULATION.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which ethnic group has the highest percentage?
interactions.intention: Find the ethnic group with the highest percentage.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP ORDER BY PERCENTAGE DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names and IATA codes of the airports in the Czech Republic?
interactions.intention: Find the names and IATA codes of airports in the Czech Republic.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, IATACODE FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT WHERE COUNTRY = 'CZ'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you sort these airports by their elevation in descending order?
interactions.intention: Sort the previously listed airports by their elevation in descending order.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, IATACODE FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT WHERE COUNTRY = 'CZ' ORDER BY ELEVATION DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which cities are associated with these airports, and what are their populations?
interactions.intention: Find the cities associated with the previously listed airports and their populations.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITY.NAME, MONDIAL_CITY.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_CITY ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.CITY = MONDIAL_CITY.NAME AND MONDIAL_AIRPORT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_AIRPORT.COUNTRY = 'CZ'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the cities and their corresponding rivers from the dataset?
interactions.intention: Find the cities and their associated rivers.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY, MONDIAL_LOCATED.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATED ON MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY = MONDIAL_LOCATED.CITY AND MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_LOCATED.COUNTRY AND MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_LOCATED.PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which city has the alternative name 'Saint Petersburg'?
interactions.intention: Find the city with the alternative name 'Saint Petersburg'.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT CITY FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME WHERE OTHERNAME = 'Saint Petersburg'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the government type of the countries where these cities are located?
interactions.intention: Find the government type of the countries where the cities from the previous question are located.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY, MONDIAL_POLITICS.GOVERNMENT FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATED ON MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY = MONDIAL_LOCATED.CITY AND MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_LOCATED.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS ON MONDIAL_POLITICS.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_LOCATED.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total area of all continents?
interactions.intention: I want to know the combined area of all continents.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(AREA) AS TOTAL_AREA FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me which continent has the smallest area?
interactions.intention: I want to find out which continent has the smallest area.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT ORDER BY AREA ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries are located in the continent with the smallest area?
interactions.intention: I want to know the countries that belong to the continent with the smallest area.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT E.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT C JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES E ON C.NAME = E.CONTINENT WHERE C.AREA = (SELECT MIN(AREA) FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the ethnic groups and their percentages in each country?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the ethnic groups and their percentages for all countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, NAME, PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: For countries with ethnic group distributions, what is their population growth?
interactions.intention: Find the population growth for countries that have ethnic group distributions.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT E.COUNTRY, P.POPULATION_GROWTH FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP E JOIN MONDIAL_POPULATION P ON E.COUNTRY = P.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which ethnic group has the highest percentage in each country?
interactions.intention: Identify the ethnic group with the highest percentage in each country.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, NAME, MAX(PERCENTAGE) FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP GROUP BY COUNTRY, NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers flow through a province in Germany and also connect to a lake?
interactions.intention: Find rivers in Germany that flow through a province and also connect to a lake.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MGE.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY MGE JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER MGR ON MGE.RIVER = MGR.RIVER AND MGE.COUNTRY = MGR.COUNTRY AND MGE.PROVINCE = MGR.PROVINCE JOIN MONDIAL_LAKE ML ON MGR.RIVER = ML.RIVER WHERE MGE.COUNTRY = 'D';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many rivers from the previous result are found in Sachsen-Anhalt?
interactions.intention: Count the number of rivers from the previous result in Sachsen-Anhalt.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT RIVER) FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY WHERE COUNTRY = 'D' AND PROVINCE = 'Sachsen-Anhalt';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names of those rivers in alphabetical order?
interactions.intention: List the names of rivers from the previous result in alphabetical order.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY WHERE COUNTRY = 'D' AND PROVINCE = 'Sachsen-Anhalt' ORDER BY RIVER ASC;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list all the seas along with the countries they are associated with?
interactions.intention: List all seas and their associated countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SEA, COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SEA

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which provinces in Japan border the Sea of Japan?
interactions.intention: Find provinces in Japan bordering the Sea of Japan.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SEA WHERE COUNTRY = 'J' AND SEA = 'Sea of Japan'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you identify the islands located in seas that are associated with Japan?
interactions.intention: Find islands in seas associated with Japan.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_ISLANDIN JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SEA ON MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.SEA = MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.COUNTRY = 'J'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which mountains are located in countries that share borders with Albania?
interactions.intention: Find mountains located in countries that share borders with Albania.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MOUNTAIN FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN WHERE COUNTRY IN (SELECT COUNTRY2 FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE COUNTRY1 = 'AL')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What rivers originate in the countries neighboring those of Albania?
interactions.intention: Find rivers originating in countries that share borders with the neighbors of Albania.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE WHERE COUNTRY IN (SELECT COUNTRY2 FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE COUNTRY1 IN (SELECT COUNTRY2 FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE COUNTRY1 = 'AL'))

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Rank the pairs of neighboring countries by the length of their borders.
interactions.intention: List neighboring country pairs and rank them by the length of their borders.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY1, COUNTRY2, LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS ORDER BY LENGTH DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which seas are connected through other seas?
interactions.intention: Find seas that are connected through other seas.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT M1.SEA1, M1.SEA2 FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH M1 JOIN MONDIAL_SEA S1 ON M1.SEA1 = S1.NAME JOIN MONDIAL_SEA S2 ON M1.SEA2 = S2.NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list all the sea connections where the first sea is 'Andaman Sea'?
interactions.intention: List all sea connections where the first sea is 'Andaman Sea'.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SEA1, SEA2 FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH WHERE SEA1 = 'Andaman Sea'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What rivers flow into seas that are connected to the 'Andaman Sea'?
interactions.intention: Find rivers that flow into seas connected to the 'Andaman Sea'.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT R.NAME FROM MONDIAL_RIVER R JOIN MONDIAL_SEA S ON R.SEA = S.NAME JOIN MONDIAL_MERGESWITH M ON M.SEA2 = S.NAME WHERE M.SEA1 = 'Andaman Sea'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the mountains listed in the database along with details like their country and province?
interactions.intention: Request a list of mountains with their country and province details.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MOUNTAIN, COUNTRY, PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which mountains are also associated with specific islands?
interactions.intention: Find mountains that are also located on islands.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MG.MOUNTAIN, MG.COUNTRY, MG.PROVINCE, MI.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN MG JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND MI ON MG.MOUNTAIN = MI.MOUNTAIN

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also include the countries' governments of those mountains on islands?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the governments of countries where mountains on islands are located.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MG.MOUNTAIN, MG.COUNTRY, MG.PROVINCE, MI.ISLAND, MP.GOVERNMENT FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN MG JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND MI ON MG.MOUNTAIN = MI.MOUNTAIN JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP ON MG.COUNTRY = MP.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the unemployment rate for countries with service-based economies?
interactions.intention: Find the unemployment rates for countries where the service sector is dominant in the economy.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, UNEMPLOYMENT FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY WHERE SERVICE > AGRICULTURE AND SERVICE > INDUSTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Among those countries, which ones have an inflation rate below 2%?
interactions.intention: Find countries with low inflation rates (below 2%) among service-based economies.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY WHERE SERVICE > AGRICULTURE AND SERVICE > INDUSTRY AND INFLATION < 2

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Do any of these countries share a border with a sea?
interactions.intention: Check if the countries with low inflation and service-based economies are located near a sea.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ME.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY ME JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SEA MGS ON ME.COUNTRY = MGS.COUNTRY WHERE ME.SERVICE > ME.AGRICULTURE AND ME.SERVICE > ME.INDUSTRY AND ME.INFLATION < 2

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries in Europe share borders, and what kind of governments do they have?
interactions.intention: Find the countries in Europe that share borders and provide their types of governments.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MB.COUNTRY1, MB.COUNTRY2, MP1.GOVERNMENT AS COUNTRY1_GOVERNMENT, MP2.GOVERNMENT AS COUNTRY2_GOVERNMENT FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS MB JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP1 ON MB.COUNTRY1 = MP1.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP2 ON MB.COUNTRY2 = MP2.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ME1 ON MB.COUNTRY1 = ME1.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ME2 ON MB.COUNTRY2 = ME2.COUNTRY WHERE ME1.CONTINENT = 'Europe' AND ME2.CONTINENT = 'Europe';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which of these countries gained independence from the Ottoman Empire?
interactions.intention: Identify countries from the previous list that gained independence from the Ottoman Empire.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MB.COUNTRY1, MB.COUNTRY2 FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS MB JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP1 ON MB.COUNTRY1 = MP1.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP2 ON MB.COUNTRY2 = MP2.COUNTRY WHERE MP1.WASDEPENDENT = 'Ottoman Empire' OR MP2.WASDEPENDENT = 'Ottoman Empire';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you rank the countries by their total border lengths with neighbors?
interactions.intention: Rank countries based on the total length of their borders with neighboring countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY1, SUM(LENGTH) AS TOTAL_BORDER_LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS GROUP BY COUNTRY1 ORDER BY TOTAL_BORDER_LENGTH DESC;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list all rivers in Germany along with their estuaries?
interactions.intention: Find all rivers in Germany and their estuaries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.RIVER, MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY ON MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.RIVER = MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.RIVER AND MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.COUNTRY = 'D';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which provinces in Germany have rivers with matching estuaries?
interactions.intention: Identify provinces in Germany where rivers have matching estuaries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY ON MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.RIVER = MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.RIVER AND MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.COUNTRY = 'D';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many unique estuaries are there in Germany?
interactions.intention: Count the number of unique estuaries in Germany.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT RIVER) FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY WHERE COUNTRY = 'D';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which provinces and countries are associated with deserts listed in the database?
interactions.intention: Find the provinces and countries linked to the deserts in the database.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MG.DESERT, MG.PROVINCE, MG.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_DESERT MD JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT MG ON MD.NAME = MG.DESERT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the other names of provinces related to those deserts?
interactions.intention: Retrieve alternate names of provinces associated with the deserts.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MG.DESERT, MP.OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_DESERT MD JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT MG ON MD.NAME = MG.DESERT JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME MP ON MG.PROVINCE = MP.PROVINCE AND MG.COUNTRY = MP.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the population statistics for those provinces?
interactions.intention: Find the population statistics for provinces linked to the deserts.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MG.DESERT, MP.PROVINCE, MP.COUNTRY, PP.YEAR, PP.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_DESERT MD JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT MG ON MD.NAME = MG.DESERT JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME MP ON MG.PROVINCE = MP.PROVINCE AND MG.COUNTRY = MP.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_PROVPOPS PP ON MP.PROVINCE = PP.PROVINCE AND MP.COUNTRY = PP.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What rivers flow into lakes that are mentioned in the database?
interactions.intention: Find the rivers that flow into any listed lakes.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_RIVER.NAME FROM MONDIAL_RIVER JOIN MONDIAL_LAKE ON MONDIAL_RIVER.LAKE = MONDIAL_LAKE.NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me which lakes are connected to rivers that flow through other lakes?
interactions.intention: Find lakes that are connected to rivers passing through other lakes.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_LAKE.NAME FROM MONDIAL_LAKE JOIN MONDIAL_RIVER ON MONDIAL_RIVER.LAKE = MONDIAL_LAKE.NAME JOIN MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH ON MONDIAL_RIVER.NAME = MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH.RIVER

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers connect multiple lakes together?
interactions.intention: Identify rivers that connect more than one lake.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH GROUP BY MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH.RIVER HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH.LAKE) > 1

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the GDP of countries that have rivers flowing within their borders?
interactions.intention: Find the GDP of countries that have rivers flowing within their borders.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ME.COUNTRY, ME.GDP FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY ME JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER MGR ON ME.COUNTRY = MGR.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the inflation rate for these countries?
interactions.intention: Find the inflation rate of the countries mentioned earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, INFLATION FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also check which rivers originate in the same countries as these?
interactions.intention: Find the rivers originating in the same countries as those mentioned earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MGR.COUNTRY, MGS.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER MGR JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE MGS ON MGR.COUNTRY = MGS.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which provinces have mountains listed in the database?
interactions.intention: Find provinces associated with mountains listed in the database.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_PROVINCE.NAME FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCE ON MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_PROVINCE.NAME;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the countries where these mountains are located?
interactions.intention: Find countries where the mountains from the previous query are located.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_PROVINCE.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCE ON MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_PROVINCE.NAME;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names of the mountains in the database, ordered by their elevation?
interactions.intention: List the names of mountains in the database, sorted by elevation.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN ORDER BY ELEVATION DESC;
